completed_tasks: Redesign builtin commands: upgrade 6 templates from one-liner to structured multi-step prompts
Add 4 enterprise-value commands: /security (OWASP audit), /plan (requirement decomposition), /audit (6-dimension codebase assessment), /bootstrap (scaffolding)
Remove 4 low-value commands: summarize, translate, explain, optimize
Fix display bug: slash commands show concise input instead of full expanded prompt
Update test assertions for new 10-command set
Add design document with research sources

previous_phase.name: MCP Support + TUI Robustness + Custom Commands

notes: Redesigned builtin commands based on research of GitHub Copilot, Claude Code bundled skills, Awesome Claude Skills (9.8k stars), and Skills Marketplace. Final set: 6 code engineering (review/test/fix/refactor/doc/commit) + 4 enterprise (security/plan/audit/bootstrap). All 66 tests pass (22 commands + 44 key_handler). Commit: 1916320.
